scripts.codegen: pnpm run contracts:compile && pnpm run contracts:artifact
scripts.smoke:workspace: pnpm run sync:network:json && pnpm run codegen && pnpm run contracts:list:json && pnpm run doctor:json && pnpm run build
scripts.dev: pnpm run sync:network && pnpm run codegen && pnpm --dir dapp dev
scripts.build: pnpm run sync:network && pnpm run codegen && pnpm --dir dapp build
